## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential content marketing collaboration between Manifold and Marcel's company for scaling high-quality scientific content production.](https://fathom.video/share/16dEkuoCeLjdoDpMF-Tb95DBdMvC4FL7?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Manifold needs to scale content production while maintaining high quality for complex scientific topics](https://fathom.video/share/16dEkuoCeLjdoDpMF-Tb95DBdMvC4FL7?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)
  - [Marcel's company offers AI-assisted content creation with human experts in the loop](https://fathom.video/share/16dEkuoCeLjdoDpMF-Tb95DBdMvC4FL7?tab=summary&timestamp=20.0)
  - [The process involves extensive research, content generation, and quality control measures](https://fathom.video/share/16dEkuoCeLjdoDpMF-Tb95DBdMvC4FL7?tab=summary&timestamp=286.0)
  - [A 90-day pilot period is available to test the service, with potential to start as early as February 10th](https://fathom.video/share/16dEkuoCeLjdoDpMF-Tb95DBdMvC4FL7?tab=summary&timestamp=1189.0)

## Topics

### Manifold's Content Needs

  - [Data management platform for multimodal genomic data](https://fathom.video/share/16dEkuoCeLjdoDpMF-Tb95DBdMvC4FL7?tab=summary&timestamp=909.0)
  - [Complex scientific topics requiring high-quality, authentic content](https://fathom.video/share/16dEkuoCeLjdoDpMF-Tb95DBdMvC4FL7?tab=summary&timestamp=920.0)
  - [Current challenge: Subject matter experts lack time to produce content at desired rate and quality](https://fathom.video/share/16dEkuoCeLjdoDpMF-Tb95DBdMvC4FL7?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
  - [Need for both foundational website content and potential longer-form gated assets](https://fathom.video/share/16dEkuoCeLjdoDpMF-Tb95DBdMvC4FL7?tab=summary&timestamp=1438.0)

### Marcel's Company's Content Creation Process

  - [Uses AI-assisted workflows with human experts for research, writing, and editing](https://fathom.video/share/16dEkuoCeLjdoDpMF-Tb95DBdMvC4FL7?tab=summary&timestamp=1014.0)
  - [Extensive initial research phase to understand client's business, audience, and competitors](https://fathom.video/share/16dEkuoCeLjdoDpMF-Tb95DBdMvC4FL7?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Content generation involves multiple steps: title creation, outlining, writing, and post-processing](https://fathom.video/share/16dEkuoCeLjdoDpMF-Tb95DBdMvC4FL7?tab=summary&timestamp=509.0)
  - [Quality control measures include fact-checking, expert review, and use of trusted sources](https://fathom.video/share/16dEkuoCeLjdoDpMF-Tb95DBdMvC4FL7?tab=summary&timestamp=1084.0)

### Customization and Quality Assurance

  - [Can customize process for highly specialized or regulated industries](https://fathom.video/share/16dEkuoCeLjdoDpMF-Tb95DBdMvC4FL7?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Options for expert verification and disclaimers to ensure content accuracy](https://fathom.video/share/16dEkuoCeLjdoDpMF-Tb95DBdMvC4FL7?tab=summary&timestamp=1084.0)
  - [Ability to use client's internal knowledge bases or trusted sources for fact-checking](https://fathom.video/share/16dEkuoCeLjdoDpMF-Tb95DBdMvC4FL7?tab=summary&timestamp=1066.0)

### Content Strategy Recommendations

  - [Start with aggressive, templatized approach to quickly build foundational content](https://fathom.video/share/16dEkuoCeLjdoDpMF-Tb95DBdMvC4FL7?tab=summary&timestamp=1326.0)
  - [Focus on creating "anchor pieces" that can be broken down into smaller articles](https://fathom.video/share/16dEkuoCeLjdoDpMF-Tb95DBdMvC4FL7?tab=summary&timestamp=1493.0)
  - [Maintain steady publishing cadence to build SEO signals and learn from performance](https://fathom.video/share/16dEkuoCeLjdoDpMF-Tb95DBdMvC4FL7?tab=summary&timestamp=1354.0)

### Next Steps and Logistics

  - [Marcel to send Slack Connect invite, meeting recording, and sample SOW](https://fathom.video/share/16dEkuoCeLjdoDpMF-Tb95DBdMvC4FL7?tab=summary&timestamp=1589.0)
  - [Taylor to review materials and share competitor/partner information](https://fathom.video/share/16dEkuoCeLjdoDpMF-Tb95DBdMvC4FL7?tab=summary&timestamp=1805.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up meeting to discuss additional questions and internal feedback](https://fathom.video/share/16dEkuoCeLjdoDpMF-Tb95DBdMvC4FL7?tab=summary&timestamp=1689.0)
  - [Decide on moving forward with the 90-day pilot, potentially starting February 10th](https://fathom.video/share/16dEkuoCeLjdoDpMF-Tb95DBdMvC4FL7?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
